mapper.sql: c.contest_id, c.contest_name, c.source_type, c.partner_id, c.category, c.group_levels, c.cover_image, c.banner_image, c.description, c.enroll_start_time, c.enroll_end_time, c.event_start_time, c.event_end_time, c.price, c.support_channel_enroll, c.support_points_deduct, c.support_appointment, c.total_quota, c.per_user_limit, c.appointment_capacity, c.writeoff_mode, c.writeoff_config, c.need_sign_in, c.team_min_size, c.team_max_size, c.team_leader_fields, c.team_member_fields, c.allow_repeat_appointment, c.allow_appointment_refund, c.cert_rule_json, c.cert_issue_mode, c.score_publish_time, c.score_publish_mode, c.score_rule_json, c.aftersale_deadline, c.organizer, c.co_organizer, c.event_address, c.organizer_logo, c.organizer_desc, c.contact_phone, c.contact_wechat, c.contact_email, c.schedule_json, c.awards_json, c.faq_json, c.recommend_tags, c.form_template_id, c.aftersale_days, c.audit_status, c.status, c.created_user_id, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, c.del_flag

c.contest_id AS contestId, c.contest_name AS contestName, c.cover_image AS coverImage, c.category AS category, c.price AS price, c.enroll_start_time AS enrollStartTime, c.enroll_end_time AS enrollEndTime, c.status AS status, CASE WHEN NOW() BETWEEN c.enroll_start_time AND c.enroll_end_time THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS enrollOpen, p.partner_name AS partnerName
mapper.select:
select
from jst_contest c where c.contest_id = #{contestId} and c.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into jst_contest ( contest_name, source_type, partner_id, category, group_levels, cover_image, banner_image, description, enroll_start_time, enroll_end_time, event_start_time, event_end_time, price, support_channel_enroll, support_points_deduct, support_appointment, total_quota, per_user_limit, appointment_capacity, writeoff_mode, writeoff_config, need_sign_in, team_min_size, team_max_size, team_leader_fields, team_member_fields, allow_repeat_appointment, allow_appointment_refund, cert_rule_json, cert_issue_mode, score_publish_time, score_publish_mode, score_rule_json, aftersale_deadline, organizer, co_organizer, event_address, organizer_logo, organizer_desc, contact_phone, contact_wechat, contact_email, schedule_json, awards_json, faq_json, recommend_tags, form_template_id, aftersale_days, audit_status, status, created_user_id, create_by, create_time, del_flag ) values ( #{contest.contestName}, #{contest.sourceType}, #{contest.partnerId}, #{contest.category}, #{contest.groupLevels}, #{contest.coverImage}, #{contest.bannerImage}, #{contest.description}, #{contest.enrollStartTime}, #{contest.enrollEndTime}, #{contest.eventStartTime}, #{contest.eventEndTime}, #{contest.price}, #{contest.supportChannelEnroll}, #{contest.supportPointsDeduct}, #{contest.supportAppointment}, #{contest.totalQuota}, #{contest.perUserLimit}, #{contest.appointmentCapacity}, #{contest.writeoffMode}, #{contest.writeoffConfig}, #{contest.needSignIn}, #{contest.teamMinSize}, #{contest.teamMaxSize}, #{contest.teamLeaderFields}, #{contest.teamMemberFields}, #{contest.allowRepeatAppointment}, #{contest.allowAppointmentRefund}, #{contest.certRuleJson}, #{contest.certIssueMode}, #{contest.scorePublishTime}, #{contest.scorePublishMode}, #{contest.scoreRuleJson}, #{contest.aftersaleDeadline}, #{contest.organizer}, #{contest.coOrganizer}, #{contest.eventAddress}, #{contest.organizerLogo}, #{contest.organizerDesc}, #{contest.contactPhone}, #{contest.contactWechat}, #{contest.contactEmail}, #{contest.scheduleJson}, #{contest.awardsJson}, #{contest.faqJson}, #{contest.recommendTags}, #{contest.formTemplateId}, #{contest.aftersaleDays}, #{contest.auditStatus}, #{contest.status}, #{contest.createdUserId}, #{contest.createBy}, #{contest.createTime}, #{contest.delFlag} )
mapper.update: update jst_contest set contest_name = #{contest.contestName}, category = #{contest.category}, group_levels = #{contest.groupLevels}, cover_image = #{contest.coverImage}, banner_image = #{contest.bannerImage}, description = #{contest.description}, enroll_start_time = #{contest.enrollStartTime}, enroll_end_time = #{contest.enrollEndTime}, event_start_time = #{contest.eventStartTime}, event_end_time = #{contest.eventEndTime}, price = #{contest.price}, support_channel_enroll = #{contest.supportChannelEnroll}, support_points_deduct = #{contest.supportPointsDeduct}, support_appointment = #{contest.supportAppointment}, total_quota = #{contest.totalQuota}, per_user_limit = #{contest.perUserLimit}, appointment_capacity = #{contest.appointmentCapacity}, writeoff_mode = #{contest.writeoffMode}, writeoff_config = #{contest.writeoffConfig}, need_sign_in = #{contest.needSignIn}, team_min_size = #{contest.teamMinSize}, team_max_size = #{contest.teamMaxSize}, team_leader_fields = #{contest.teamLeaderFields}, team_member_fields = #{contest.teamMemberFields}, allow_repeat_appointment = #{contest.allowRepeatAppointment}, allow_appointment_refund = #{contest.allowAppointmentRefund}, cert_rule_json = #{contest.certRuleJson}, cert_issue_mode = #{contest.certIssueMode}, score_publish_time = #{contest.scorePublishTime}, score_publish_mode = #{contest.scorePublishMode}, score_rule_json = #{contest.scoreRuleJson}, aftersale_deadline = #{contest.aftersaleDeadline}, organizer = #{contest.organizer}, co_organizer = #{contest.coOrganizer}, event_address = #{contest.eventAddress}, organizer_logo = #{contest.organizerLogo}, organizer_desc = #{contest.organizerDesc}, contact_phone = #{contest.contactPhone}, contact_wechat = #{contest.contactWechat}, contact_email = #{contest.contactEmail}, schedule_json = #{contest.scheduleJson}, awards_json = #{contest.awardsJson}, faq_json = #{contest.faqJson}, recommend_tags = #{contest.recommendTags}, form_template_id = #{contest.formTemplateId}, aftersale_days = #{contest.aftersaleDays}, update_by = #{contest.updateBy}, update_time = #{contest.updateTime} where contest_id = #{contest.contestId} and audit_status = #{expectedAuditStatus} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select c.contest_id AS contestId, c.contest_name AS contestName, c.source_type AS sourceType, c.partner_id AS partnerId, p.partner_name AS partnerName, c.category AS category, c.group_levels AS groupLevels, c.cover_image AS coverImage, c.banner_image AS bannerImage, c.description AS description, c.enroll_start_time AS enrollStartTime, c.enroll_end_time AS enrollEndTime, c.event_start_time AS eventStartTime, c.event_end_time AS eventEndTime, c.price AS price, c.support_channel_enroll AS supportChannelEnroll, c.support_points_deduct AS supportPointsDeduct, c.support_appointment AS supportAppointment, c.total_quota AS totalQuota, c.per_user_limit AS perUserLimit, c.appointment_capacity AS appointmentCapacity, c.writeoff_mode AS writeoffMode, c.writeoff_config AS writeoffConfig, c.need_sign_in AS needSignIn, c.team_min_size AS teamMinSize, c.team_max_size AS teamMaxSize, c.team_leader_fields AS teamLeaderFields, c.team_member_fields AS teamMemberFields, c.allow_repeat_appointment AS allowRepeatAppointment, c.allow_appointment_refund AS allowAppointmentRefund, c.cert_rule_json AS certRuleJson, c.cert_issue_mode AS certIssueMode, c.score_publish_time AS scorePublishTime, c.score_publish_mode AS scorePublishMode, c.score_rule_json AS scoreRuleJson, c.aftersale_deadline AS aftersaleDeadline, c.organizer AS organizer, c.co_organizer AS coOrganizer, c.event_address AS eventAddress, c.organizer_logo AS organizerLogo, c.organizer_desc AS organizerDesc, c.contact_phone AS contactPhone, c.contact_wechat AS contactWechat, c.contact_email AS contactEmail, c.schedule_json AS scheduleJson, c.awards_json AS awardsJson, c.faq_json AS faqJson, c.recommend_tags AS recommendTags, c.form_template_id AS formTemplateId, c.aftersale_days AS aftersaleDays, c.audit_status AS auditStatus, c.remark AS auditRemark, c.status AS status, c.created_user_id AS createdUserId from jst_contest c left join jst_event_partner p on p.partner_id = c.partner_id and p.del_flag = '0' where c.contest_id = #{contestId} and c.del_flag = '0' limit 1

select
from jst_contest c left join jst_event_partner p on p.partner_id = c.partner_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join ( select contest_id, count(1) AS enroll_count from jst_enroll_record where del_flag = '0' group by contest_id ) ec on ec.contest_id = c.contest_id
c.del_flag = '0' and c.audit_status = 'online'
and c.category = #{query.category}
and ifnull(c.support_appointment, 0) = 0
and ifnull(c.support_appointment, 0) = 1 and ifnull(c.support_channel_enroll, 0) = 0
and ifnull(c.support_appointment, 0) = 1 and ifnull(c.support_channel_enroll, 0) = 1
and find_in_set(#{query.groupLevel}, c.group_levels)
and c.recommend_tags is not null and c.recommend_tags like concat('%', #{query.tag}, '%')
and c.contest_name like concat('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')
order by ifnull(ec.enroll_count, 0) desc, c.create_time desc, c.contest_id desc
order by c.create_time desc, c.contest_id desc
order by c.enroll_end_time asc, c.contest_id desc
order by c.enroll_start_time desc, c.contest_id desc

select c.contest_id AS contestId, c.contest_name AS contestName, c.cover_image AS coverImage, c.banner_image AS bannerImage, c.category AS category, c.group_levels AS groupLevels, c.description AS description, c.price AS price, c.enroll_start_time AS enrollStartTime, c.enroll_end_time AS enrollEndTime, c.event_start_time AS eventStartTime, c.event_end_time AS eventEndTime, c.status AS status, CASE WHEN NOW() BETWEEN c.enroll_start_time AND c.enroll_end_time THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS enrollOpen, p.partner_name AS partnerName, c.support_channel_enroll AS supportChannelEnroll, c.support_points_deduct AS supportPointsDeduct, c.support_appointment AS supportAppointment, c.total_quota AS totalQuota, c.per_user_limit AS perUserLimit, c.appointment_capacity AS appointmentCapacity, c.writeoff_mode AS writeoffMode, c.writeoff_config AS writeoffConfig, c.need_sign_in AS needSignIn, c.team_min_size AS teamMinSize, c.team_max_size AS teamMaxSize, c.team_leader_fields AS teamLeaderFields, c.team_member_fields AS teamMemberFields, c.allow_repeat_appointment AS allowRepeatAppointment, c.schedule_json AS scheduleJson, c.awards_json AS awardsJson, c.faq_json AS faqJson, c.recommend_tags AS recommendTags, c.cert_rule_json AS certRuleJson, c.cert_issue_mode AS certIssueMode, c.score_publish_time AS scorePublishTime, c.score_publish_mode AS scorePublishMode, c.score_rule_json AS scoreRuleJson, c.aftersale_days AS aftersaleDays, c.aftersale_deadline AS aftersaleDeadline, c.organizer AS organizer, c.co_organizer AS coOrganizer, c.event_address AS eventAddress, c.organizer_logo AS organizerLogo, c.organizer_desc AS organizerDesc, c.contact_phone AS contactPhone, c.contact_wechat AS contactWechat, c.contact_email AS contactEmail from jst_contest c left join jst_event_partner p on p.partner_id = c.partner_id and p.del_flag = '0' where c.contest_id = #{contestId} and c.del_flag = '0' and c.audit_status = 'online' limit 1

select
from jst_contest c left join jst_event_partner p on p.partner_id = c.partner_id and p.del_flag = '0' where c.del_flag = '0' and c.audit_status = 'online' order by c.create_time desc, c.contest_id desc limit #{limit}

select c.course_id AS courseId, c.course_name AS courseName, c.cover_image AS coverImage, c.price AS price, ifnull(l.learner_count, 0) AS learnerCount from jst_course c left join ( select course_id, count(1) AS learner_count from jst_course_learn_record where del_flag = '0' group by course_id ) l on l.course_id = c.course_id where c.del_flag = '0' and c.audit_status = 'approved' and c.status = 'on' order by learnerCount desc, c.update_time desc, c.course_id desc limit #{limit}

select d.dict_value AS code, d.dict_label AS name, ifnull(t.contest_count, 0) AS count from sys_dict_data d left join ( select category, count(1) AS contest_count from jst_contest where del_flag = '0' and audit_status = 'online' group by category ) t on t.category = d.dict_value where d.dict_type = 'jst_contest_category' and d.status = '0' order by d.dict_sort asc, d.dict_code asc
select count(1) from jst_score_record where contest_id = #{contestId} and publish_status = 'published' and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select sr.score_value from jst_score_record sr inner join jst_enroll_record er on er.enroll_id = sr.enroll_id and er.del_flag = '0' where sr.contest_id = #{contestId} and er.user_id = #{userId} and sr.publish_status = 'published' and sr.del_flag = '0' order by sr.score_value desc limit 1

select cr.cert_id, cr.cert_no, cr.cert_file_url, cr.issue_status from jst_cert_record cr where cr.contest_id = #{contestId} and cr.user_id = #{userId} and cr.del_flag = '0' order by cr.create_time desc limit 1
